get.description: Health check endpoint.
Get application version.
Get current authenticated user with family context.

post.description: Login with email and password.
Register with a family code.
Logout current user.
Switch active family context.
Request password reset email.
Reset password using magic link token.
Change password (requires current password).
Reset another user's password (admin only).

get.description: Check if initial setup is needed (no super admins exist).

post.description:
Initial platform setup - creates super admin and first family.
Only works if no super admins exist.

get.description: List all families (super admin only).

post.description:
Create a new family (super admin only).

The creating user is automatically added as admin of the new family.

get.description: Get family code for current family (admins only).

post.description: Regenerate family code (admins only).
Send a magic link for password recovery (backwards compat).

get.description: List all events for current family.

post.description: Create a new event in current family.

get.description: List upcoming events for current family.
Get list of predefined holidays for the holiday picker.
Get a specific event.

put.description: Update an event (creator or admin only).

delete.description: Delete an event (creator or admin only).

post.description: Cancel an event (creator or admin only).

get.description:
Get anonymous health information for event attendees.

Only returns health info from users who:
1. Have RSVPed 'yes' to this event
2. Have explicitly enabled health info sharing (share_health_info = true)

Information is returned anonymously - no names are attached.
Only event managers (creator or family admins) can access this.
List sub-events for a parent event.

post.description: Create a sub-event under a parent event.

get.description: List wedding party members for an event.

post.description: Add a wedding party member.

get.description: List all members in current family.
Get a specific family member.

delete.description: Remove a member from the family (admin only).

get.description: Get family address book with contact info (respects visibility).

post.description: Invite a new member to the family (admin only).
Change a member's role (admin only).

get.description: Get current user's profile.
Get visibility settings for a specific family.

put.description: Update visibility settings for a specific family.

get.description: Get health-related profile info (allergies, medical needs).
Get potluck info for an event.
List all potluck items for an event.

post.description: Add a potluck item. Permissions vary by potluck mode.

put.description: Update a potluck item (family admin or event creator only).

delete.description: Delete a potluck item (family admin or event creator only).

post.description: Claim a potluck item.

get.description: Get items claimed by current user.
Get Gift Exchange info for an event.
Get current user's Gift Exchange assignment (who they give to).

post.description: Run the Gift Exchange assignment algorithm (family admin or event creator only).

get.description: List exclusion rules for Gift Exchange.

post.description: Add an exclusion rule (family admin or event creator only).

delete.description: Remove an exclusion rule (family admin or event creator only).

post.description: Send an anonymous message to your Gift Exchange giftee.

get.description: Get anonymous messages for Gift Exchange (messages received from your match).
Get list of participants for Gift Exchange.

Get application settings.

- Public: app_name
- Authenticated: family-specific settings
- Super admin: SMTP and other sensitive global settings

put.description: Update settings (backwards compatibility, redirects to global).
Update global application settings (super admin only).

get.description: Get the current family's join code (family admin only).

post.description: Regenerate the family join code (family admin only).

get.description: Get current user's preferences.
Get current user's wishlist.

post.description: Add an item to wishlist.

get.description:
Get another user's wishlist.

Only allowed if:
1. You're viewing your own wishlist
2. You're a family admin
3. You're assigned to give a gift to this user (Gift Exchange)
4. Target user is in the same family
Backwards compatible alias for get_user_wishlist.
List polls for the current family, optionally filtered by event.

post.description: Create a new poll.

get.description: Get a single poll with full details.

delete.description: Delete a poll. Requires creator or family admin.

post.description: Vote on a poll. Single-select replaces previous vote. Multi-select toggles.
Manually close a poll. Requires creator or family admin.

get.description: Export poll results as CSV. Requires creator or family admin.
List comments for an event. Pinned comments appear first, then chronological.

post.description: Add a comment to an event. Parses @mentions and fires notifications.

put.description: Edit own comment. Sets edited_at timestamp.

delete.description: Delete own comment. Family admins can delete any comment.

post.description: Pin a comment. Only event creator or family admin can pin.

delete.description: Unpin a comment. Only event creator or family admin can unpin.

post.description: Toggle a reaction on a comment. Add if not present, remove if already there.

get.description: List photos for an event, ordered by display_order.

schema.title: Response List Photos Api Events  Event Id  Photos Get

post.description: Upload a photo to an event.

schema.title: Response Upload Photo Api Events  Event Id  Photos Post

delete.description: Delete a photo. Uploader or admin can delete.

put.description: Reorder photos for an event. Event creator or admin only.

schema.title: Response Reorder Photos Api Events  Event Id  Photos Reorder Put

get.description: List available poll templates (built-in + family custom).

post.description: Create a custom poll template for the current family.

delete.description: Delete a custom poll template. Built-in templates cannot be deleted.

get.description: Download a single event as an .ics file.
Public calendar feed URL. No auth — secured by unique feed token.
Get the calendar feed URL for the current family.

schema.title: Response Get Feed Url Api Calendar Feed Url Get

post.description: Regenerate the calendar feed token. Admin only. Old URL stops working.

schema.title: Response Regenerate Feed Token Api Calendar Regenerate Token Post

get.description:
Get all notification settings (super admin only).

Sensitive values (tokens, webhooks) are masked.

put.description:
Update notification settings (super admin only).

Masked values (********) are ignored to avoid overwriting secrets.

post.description: Test a notification service by sending a test message (super admin only).

delete.description: Delete a baby shower update. Requires event creator or family admin.

delete.description: Delete a registry item. Requires event creator or family admin.

post.description: Claim (reserve) a registry item.

delete.description: Unclaim (release) a registry item. Only the claimer can unclaim.

post.description: Mark a claimed registry item as purchased. Only the claimer can mark.
RSVP to an event (yes/no/maybe).

get.description: List the current user's additional guests for an event.

post.description: Add an additional guest to the user's RSVP.

delete.description: Remove an additional guest from the user's RSVP.

post.description: Create a new event template. Requires family admin.

delete.description: Delete an event template. Requires family admin.

get.description: Serve SPA for all non-API routes.
